titleStmt.title: SII 39.176: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 176. (A.R. No. 176 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE FIRST PRAKĀRA OF THE SAME TEMPLE ŚAḌAGŌPAVARMAṈ ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-13TH YEAR [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of land with all taxes at Tayirpākkam, a hamlet of Dāmar, for the supply of food offerings to the Āḻvārs setup in the temple by Varandarum-perumāḷ-Eḍuttakai-Aḻagiyāṉ alias Pallavarāyaṉ of Tuñjalūr in Tirumaḻalaikkūṟṟanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī madāmagrāmapikratrama saripurvvapatigrāma bhūsam paścimaṇḍapākam pisuyāsimnasti vettaram . grāmmānya
subhagaḥ kṣirāpagāda kṣi svāmibhyodadhipāka samjñamadiśatsvāmi pallavādhiśvar kocaṭa koppatmarāṉa tribhuc cakkaravarttikaḷ
śrī sundarapāṇḍiyade ku yāṇṭu 10 3 makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ tāmaṟ
koṭṭattu tāmaṟnāṭṭu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻiyil nāṉ Eḻuntaruḷivitta Āḻvārkaḷḷukkut tirumaḻalaik kūṟanāṭṭut tuñcalūr Uṭaiyaṉ varan
tarum perumāḷ Eḻuttakai Aḻakiyāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Innāṭṭut tāmaṟ piṭākai tayir pākkam pālāṟṟukkut teṟku vati Ellaikku me
ṟku muṭṭaippākkat tellaikku vaṭakkut tayirppākkattu nīrvarukiṟa kāl muṭakkukkum Ikkoyil ḻivanta perumāḷ tiruviṭai Āṭṭa
māṉa muppatu vaṭṭikkum kiḻakku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattu naṉcey puṉcey nilattu Iṟaiyili tevatāṉa tiruviṭai Āṭṭaṅkaḷ nīkki Uḷḷa ni
laṅkaḷil kaṭamai poṉvari Āyam puṟakkalaṉai Uḷpaṭṭa Aṉaittu varikaḷum Uṭpaṭa sarvamāṉiyamāka Āḻvārkaḷukku veppaṉ
santhiyile paṉṉireṇṭu taḷikai tiruppoṉakamum Irāpaṉṉiraṇṭu taḷikai tiruppoṉakamum Āka Irupattu nālu taḷikaiku nāḷ va
ṭṭam kala Ariciyum kariveñcaṉaṅkaḷḷukkum cāttuppaṭikkum viḷakkukkum tiruppari caṭṭaṅkaḷukkum tirumāvaṭi
kkum candrādityavarai celvatāka perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya devar tirumukappaṭiye kallilum cempilum veṭṭi kal
miśāsaṉamum paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumāḷ mutalikaḷḷil pallavarāyaṉeṉḥ§
Digital edition of SII 39.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
